definition: legs across venues cover every mutually exclusive terminal outcome
valid_core_invariant: minimum net cash flow across all terminal scenarios is positive after all costs
missing_in_reference: identity proof, executable size, exact fee functions, rule compatibility, completion risk, settlement replay

definition: buy a complete set of complementary outcome tokens below redeemable collateral
valid_core_invariant: filled complete-set cost plus fees/gas is below collateral recovered by merge/redeem
missing_in_reference: pair atomicity, verified fill quantities, current V2/pUSD semantics, reserved aggregate budget
project_role: separate paper branch; never conflate with cross-venue surebet

definition: bookmaker/exchange back position hedged by exchange lay liability
valid_core_invariant: outcome-specific back/lay cash-flow vector stays positive after commission and liability
missing_in_reference: no attached bot implements it correctly

definition: different contract forms replicate the same payoff vector
observed_repo: BOT-08 canonical outcomes partly support this
valid_core_invariant: payoff vectors and settlement rules are exactly equivalent for every scenario

definition: split one desired selection across providers for best execution
valid_core_invariant: same exposure acquired at lowest expected cost within slippage/depth constraints
missing_in_reference: explicit requested-size shortfall and reliable accepted fills
project_role: not surebet; future execution-quality simulator only

definition: post and maintain maker quotes while limiting visible size
valid_core_invariant: inventory-adjusted spread/rebate return exceeds adverse selection and costs
missing_in_reference: durable state, current realtime, rigorous inventory and fill model
staleness, inventory, idempotency, current protocol, security
